author: Deyan Todorov
name: 11L Int6 Core Stack 1xH100
blurb: Non-record 1xH100 submission: 11-layer 512-dim with 3x MLP, int6+zstd, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048), OrthoInit+muP, SWA, Muon WD=0.04. Validated across 55+ experiments on A40 and H100. Pending 8xH100 compute grant.
architecture: 11 layers, 512 dim, 8 heads, 4 KV heads, MLP mult 3, tied embeddings, SmearGate, BigramHash(2048)
notes: Single-GPU result (822 steps at 724ms/step). On 2xH100: 1.2216 pre-quant at 1646 steps. Extrapolated 8xH100: ~1.14-1.15. Requesting compute grant for 8xH100 submission with FA3+TTT+EMA.
